===================
===================
=== bd1990-07-09_montreux_LTD.txt
===================
===================
===================
July 9 1990 
Casino de Montreux 
Montreux, Switzerland 


Taper: Legendary Taper D
Source: udio disks derived from analog master > (dBpowerAMP set to compression level 6) flac
+one extra generation of cd-r


Info from Olof:

Disk One:
Absolutely Sweet Marie
Ballad Of A Thin Man
Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again
I'll Remember You
Masters Of War
Gotta Serve Somebody
It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
Gates Of Eden

Disk Two

Mr. Tambourine Man
It Ain't Me, Babe
Across The Borderline (Ry Cooder/John Hiatt/Jim Dickinson)
Everything Is Broken
I Believe In You
All Along The Watchtower
I Shall Be Released
Like A Rolling Stone
 
Blowin' In The Wind
Highway 61 Revisited
 

Concert # 210 of The Never-Ending Tour.  Concert # 9 of the 1990 Summer Festival Tour Of 
Europe. 1990 concert # 40.

 

Concert # 132  with the second Never-Ending Tour band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), G. E. 
Smith (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Christopher Parker (drums).

 

7-11, 18 acoustic with the band.

 

2, 4, 8, 10, 11, 18  Bob Dylan harmonica.

 

12  Flaco Jimenez (accordion).

 

19  G.E. Smith (electric slide guitar).

 

BobTalk:

 

Thank You! Did that sound all right? ... Yeah! It's the same up here. (after It's Alright,
Ma)

 

Alright, we wanna play this song again. You heard it already once tonight. It's SO 
good you'll hear it again. (before Across The Borderline).

 

Here's a song from my last album called Oh Mercy. (before Everything Is Broken).

 

Note. The concert starts with seven bars of Silvio.

 

9 new songs (47%) compared to previous concert. 2 new songs for this tour.

 

Stereo audience recording, 90 minutes.
===================

===================
